This is a testharness.js-based test.
Harness Error. harness_status.status = 1 , harness_status.message = Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'next')
PASS Observable constructor
FAIL Subscriber interface is not constructible assert_implements: The Subscriber interface is not implemented undefined
PASS subscribe() can be called with no arguments
FAIL Observable constructor calls initializer on subscribe assert_array_equals: should emit values synchronously lengths differ, expected array [1, 2, 3, "complete"] length 4, got [] length 0
FAIL Observable error path called synchronously assert_array_equals: should emit error synchronously lengths differ, expected array [1, 2, object "Error: error"] length 3, got [] length 0
FAIL Observable should error if initializer throws assert_array_equals: should emit values and the throw error synchronously lengths differ, expected array [1, object "Error: error"] length 2, got [] length 0
FAIL Subscription does not emit values after completion assert_array_equals: should emit values synchronously, but not nexted values after complete lengths differ, expected array [1, 2, "complete"] length 3, got [] length 0
FAIL Subscription does not emit values after error assert_array_equals: should emit values synchronously, but not nexted values after error lengths differ, expected array [1, 2, object "Error: error"] length 3, got [] length 0
FAIL Completing or nexting a subscriber after an error does nothing assert_array_equals: should emit synchronously lengths differ, expected array [1, 2, object "Error: error"] length 3, got [] length 0
FAIL Errors pushed to the subscriber that are not handled by the subscription are reported to the global assert_true: expected true got false
FAIL Errors thrown in the initializer that are not handled by the subscription are reported to the global assert_true: expected true got false
FAIL Subscription reports errors that are pushed after subscriber is closed by completion assert_array_equals: should emit values synchronously, but not error values after complete lengths differ, expected array [1, 2, "complete"] length 3, got [] length 0
FAIL Errors thrown by initializer function after subscriber is closed by completion are reported assert_array_equals: should emit values synchronously, but not error after complete lengths differ, expected array [1, 2, "complete"] length 3, got [] length 0
Harness: the test ran to completion.
